rulings.Case Title: ROBERT W HEAGY JR VS. MICHAEL GOLDWATER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 31, 2017, line 10. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL GOLDWATER, FUMIE GOLDWATER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to plead "that at least one of the grounds enumerated in Section 37.9(a) or (b) and also stated in the notice to vacate is the dominant motive for recovering possession." Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/REQ)
